summary: Comprehensive testing of Keeps financial dashboard completed successfully. All backend APIs working perfectly (25/25 tests passed). Frontend authentication, navigation, and core features tested successfully. Protected routes working correctly.
passed_tests: Auth: Login, Register, /auth/me endpoint, Logout - All working
Dashboard: Summary API returns correct revenue/pending/tax stats
Invoices: CRUD operations (Create, List, Update status, Delete) - All working
Tax Calculators: VAT, Withholding, Income tax calculations - All working
Tax Vault: Get vault, Set target, Deposit, Withdraw - All working
Projects: Create, Add milestone, List, Delete - All working
AI Advisor: Chat functionality working with Gemini 3 Flash
FX Rates: Exchange rates API working with fallback
Clients: List and Create operations working
Frontend: Auth page renders correctly with login/register tabs
Frontend: Dashboard loads with stats cards, chart, and recent invoices
Frontend: Navigation between pages (Invoices, Tax, Projects) working
Frontend: Protected routes redirect to /auth when not logged in
